title: Sync NautilusTrader upstream snapshot and admin console design baseline
body:
## Goal

Import the upstream `nautechsystems/nautilus_trader` source snapshot into this independent repository, update truth docs/memory to match the real code layout, and add the admin console design + implementation planning baseline.

## Scope

- sync upstream source snapshot into this repository without keeping upstream git linkage
- preserve governance, memory, truth-doc, and PR gate controls
- update system truth and repo memory to reflect the imported codebase
- write the admin console design and implementation plan for localhost single-user operations

## Notes

- This work should continue through PR only.
- Remote Codex review is required before merge.
